summary: Good matrix recording captures a stellar set highlighted by Terrapin Station, Women Are Smarter, Crazy Fingers and a rocking Throwing Stones/Turn On Your Love Light.
review: The reviewer raves about the performance, calling the first set “fabulous” and praising songs like Terrapin Station, Women Are Smarter and Crazy Fingers. The encore and the Throwing Stones → Turn On Your Love Light sequence are also singled out as great moments, and the sound is described as good despite no detailed technical notes. Overall it’s a highly enjoyable show with solid audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review emphasizes excellent musical performance and good sound quality; weighted toward show quality yields a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions the sound as "good" with no specific issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as fabulous; second‑set opener Women Are Smarter is a treat, leading into high‑energy Crazy Fingers and a strong Throwing Stones/Turn On Your Love Light finale.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Encore "Hello" sounded good according to the reviewer.
